metadata.wafAnalogueDisclaimer: Not an official Microsoft Well-Architected submission; illustrative mapping of SOC2-aligned catalog keys to pillar themes for pilots.
metadata.pillarSummary: Reliability: DR (saas-ctrl-006). Security: logging/encryption/access/thirdparty/segmentation (saas-ctrl-001 through 005). Cost: advisory and sizing reviews alongside pack assignment. Operational excellence: changes/monitoring (saas-ctrl-007/008). Performance: workload characteristics evaluated at runtime; extend keys when you add latency-specific compliance rules.
metadata.sourceVerticalKeys: Reuses SaaS vertical rule ids from bundled templates/policy-packs/saas/
